description: An agent must calculate the billable utilization rate for a team of consultants from timesheet data.

nodes.task_description: Load timesheet data showing total hours and billable hours for each consultant.
For each consultant, calculate their utilization rate (Billable Hours / Total Hours).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly calculates the rate for each person.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the average utilization rate for the entire team.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides the correct team average.
